# WINetworkSharingError.appNotInForeground

**Case**

Indicates your app can’t perform the requested operation because it isn’t running in the foreground.

## Declaration

```swift
case appNotInForeground
```

## Checking for app issues

- **WINetworkSharingError.appNotPermitted**: Indicates the person hasn’t granted your app permission to use the shared networks API for the accessory.
